case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ROBERT MACDOWELL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACDOWELL, ROBERT $7,621.96 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,421.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210012407)
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 200041043) TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
